prompt: I need Instagram ad copy for a skincare brand called 'Glow Theory' launching a vitamin C serum globally. Target audience is women 25-40 who care about clean beauty and are skeptical of over-hyped products. Price point is $38. Give me copy for both a feed ad and a story ad.

assertions.text: Includes both feed ad and story ad copy
Feed ad opens with a strong first-line hook
Copy focuses on skin benefits, not just ingredient specs
No region-specific slang or idioms (global audience safe)
Includes a clear call to action
